# Studio Archive Agent Guide

This adopted custom PiCM workspace keeps its existing folder names.
Route work by purpose:

- `incoming/` for unsorted archive notes.
- `catalog/` for organized item descriptions.
- `publishing/` for public-facing summaries.

Read root `CONTEXT.md` first, then local folder context when present.
Skip `.picm/` during normal workflow routing; it is maintainer metadata.
